attachment.snippet:
1	- [DOG_DONE all-rigs-fail = pack script bug](feedback_dog_done_pattern.md) — When every db fails the same way, the script is wrong; reproduce the SQL manually.
2	- [Reaper leaves orphan-edge stale wisps by design](project_reaper_orphan_wisps.md) — `stale_wisps:N, closed:0` is normal for old notification wisps without parent edges.
3	- [bd parent-child + umbrella-blocks-child = cycle](feedback_bd_parent_child_cycle.md) — When using `--parent`, don't add `bd dep add umbrella child` blocks edges; the parent-child auto-dep already wires it and the reverse wedges the child out of `bd ready`.
4	- [Collectivus has no DuckDB — squirreling + hyparquet stack](project_collectivus_query_stack.md) — SQL via in-house `squirreling`, Parquet I/O via `hyparquet`; don't write design docs that assume DuckDB is available.
5	- [Patrol wisps accumulate from session restarts](project_patrol_wisp_accumulation.md) — `patrol-wisp-next.sh` only checks in_progress, so unstarted open wisps pile up; burn own orphans during patrol.
6	- [JSONL spike-halt DOG_DONEs are expected variance](project_jsonl_spike_halt_expected.md) — Script self-escalates to mayor on each halt; don't duplicate. Only re-surface if pathological.
7	- [Polecat routing needs qualified gc.routed_to](feedback_polecat_routing_qualified.md) — `<rig>/hypcity-overrides.polecat`, not `<rig>/polecat`; short form silently sits unclaimed.
8	- [patrol-wisp-next.sh "formula not found" warning is benign](feedback_patrol_wisp_formula_warning.md) — Side effect of Dolt restarts (hy-4u0t); wisp still poured. Don't investigate.
9	- [Refinery "stale" flag is often a false positive](feedback_refinery_stale_flag_false_positive.md) — Peek the session before warranting; refinery's own patrol wisp ages past 900s during idle event-watch.
